name: Butternut Squash Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the squash in half lengthwise and scoop out and discard the seeds.
2. Bake the squash, cut side down, on a lightly oiled baking sheet in a preheated 400°F oven for 40 minutes or until it is tender.
3. When cool enough to handle, scoop out all the pulp.
4. While the squash is baking, cook the onion and gingerroot in butter over low heat, stirring until the onion is softened.
5. Puree the onion mixture with the squash pulp in a food processor.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Yield: 2 1/2 cups or 4 to 6 servings
